title: Summary of NATO's Quantum Technologies Strategy
description: NATO official text summarising the Alliance's first Quantum Technologies Strategy (approved Nov 2023, released Jan 2024). States a desired end-state of transitioning NATO cryptographic systems to quantum-safe cryptography and supporting development of PQC and QKD.

title: NATO releases first ever quantum strategy
description: NATO News (17 Jan 2024) announcing the first quantum strategy, including securing data communications using quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: NATO releases first ever quantum strategy (news article)
description: NATO news article version announcing the first quantum strategy and the move to quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: Using quantum technologies to make communications secure
description: NATO news article (27 Sep 2022) describing NATO efforts on post-quantum cryptography and quantum key distribution to secure communications.

title: Using quantum technologies to make communications secure (cps)
description: NATO News (cps URL) on quantum technologies for secure communications, covering PQC and QKD.

title: NATO works on quantum cryptography with Malta
description: NATO News on the first SPS project with Malta to establish and implement post-quantum cryptographic solutions and protocols, plus QKD over submarine optical fibre.

title: Quantum Technologies and the Science for Peace and Security Programme
description: NATO SPS Programme document on quantum technology activities, including post-quantum cryptography and quantum key distribution projects.

title: NATO Cyber Security Centre experiments with secure network capable of withstanding attack by quantum computers
description: NCI Agency / NATO Cyber Security Centre press release on successful testing of a hybrid post-quantum VPN, proposed to IETF for standardisation.

title: NCIA - Quantum Leap
description: NCI Agency newsroom feature on NATO quantum-safe work including post-quantum cryptography and quantum key distribution.

title: NCIA - NATO releases first ever quantum strategy
description: NCI Agency newsroom item on the NATO quantum strategy and quantum-resistant cryptography.

title: NATO Exploring Quantum Technology for Future Challenges
description: NATO Allied Command Transformation (ACT) article on quantum technology including the need to upgrade and secure digital infrastructure using quantum-resistant / post-quantum cryptography; IFF tactical drone PQC experiment.

title: Quantum Computing and Artificial Intelligence Expected to Revolutionize ISR
description: NATO ACT article on quantum computing and AI for ISR; references quantum threat to encryption.

title: Advanced Communication Technologies (DIANA challenge)
description: NATO DIANA challenge document featuring communication systems with integrated post-quantum cryptography.

title: Towards a Quantum-Secure Hybrid Encryptor Using Post-Quantum Cryptography and Quantum Key Distribution
description: NATO Science and Technology Organization (STO) meeting paper on a hybrid encryptor combining PQC and QKD for quantum-resistant security.

title: Towards Resilient and Quantum-Safe RADAR Communication
description: NATO STO meeting paper proposing PQC / quantum communication for resilient military RADAR communication; authored by Terma A/S researchers.

title: DISCRETION: Quantum Secure Communications for European Defence
description: NATO STO meeting paper on QKD-based quantum secure communications for European defence, in the context of post-quantum cryptography.

title: Towards Resilient and Quantum-Safe RADAR Communication (PDF)
description: NATO STO meeting proceedings PDF on quantum-safe RADAR communication using post-quantum cryptography.

title: DISCRETION: Quantum Secure Communications for European Defence (PDF)
description: NATO STO meeting proceedings PDF on quantum secure communications for European defence, post-quantum context.

title: ETSI/IQC Quantum Safe Cryptography Event - NATO presentation (Sliwa/Wrona)
description: Presentation by NATO Cyber Security Centre (Sliwa, Wrona) at ETSI/IQC event on NATO PQC migration approaches; hosted on ETSI docbox.
